productDisplayName: Red Tape Men Brown Casual Shoe
description: Composition:These shoes are made of pure leatherCare: Use a branded shoe polish to keep your leather footwear clean and shinyFit:RegularGeneral:leather shoes have long been known to be the essential formal footwear. However, the current trend lists leather shoes, be it black, tan, brown or fawn, as the most versatile piece of footwear. They can also be combined with ultra-slim fit jeans and a jazzy party shirt, with gelled hair and minimal accessories so that the focus remains on the style and not the accessories. In case of these shoes, they will go very well with semi formal fuchsia shirt and black linen trousers. If you don not want to go over the board with style, then you can always stick to simple black trousers, slim-fit in this case is a must, and a fawn coloured very formal shirt.
